openFindings.title: Prompt-improver agents still route integration metadata to removed `/prompt` command
Custom save path lacks containment and overwrite guard
prompt-models packet denies read tools required by its router contract
New spec-folder save branch derives a shell-created path from unsanitized topic text
prompt-improve manual-testing scenarios still verify pre-fold hub-root resource paths
openFindings.description: The prompt-improve manual-testing playbook still points scenario evidence at .opencode/skills/sk-prompt/SKILL.md and .opencode/skills/sk-prompt/references/* even though live packet resources are under .opencode/skills/sk-prompt/prompt-improve/.

openFindings.title: /prompt-improve save-location workflow still discovers and creates legacy specs/ paths
prompt-models README quick-start and verification commands point at a non-existent top-level skill path
Closeout follow-up text points at a live dispatch that later evidence shows is insufficient
prompt-models README omits GLM-5.2 from its maintainer-facing framework map
context_budget verification command still points at the removed top-level prompt-models path

data.reason: STOP is blocked by 1 blocker(s): uncovered_dimensions

searchDebt.rationale: This iteration found the coverage gap but did not audit the full playbook corpus as a maintainability/traceability artifact.
searchDebt.reason: Defer broader playbook capability coverage to traceability or maintainability dimension.

searchDebt.rationale: this is a coverage gap, not a confirmed behavior failure, because no scoped spec or gold scenario requires an ordered bundle route
searchDebt.reason: author a bundle gold scenario before severity escalation

searchDebt.rationale: no phase-local checklist exists to audit; this is not itself a finding because phase 008 documents the Level-1 exemption
searchDebt.reason: checklist artifact absent by documented Level-1 phase decision

searchDebt.rationale: The follow-ups are real but intentionally non-blocking; this iteration focused on stale maintainer docs with direct fix paths.
searchDebt.reason: covered as benchmark hardening follow-up, not an additional iteration-008 finding

searchDebt.rationale: potential same-class README cleanup should be folded into existing R8-P2-001 remediation rather than raised as a new correctness finding here
Risk remains active but is already represented by prior findings; re-raising would duplicate the registry.
